case_title: RODRIGUEZ, FRANK VS MARTINEZ, PABLO IND DBA "18TH ST.& MISSION MARKET" et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF SEP-20-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO PABLO MARTINEZ IND/DBA 18TH ST MISSION ST. MARKET RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-06-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF OCT-28-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING TO DIANA WENG, AND CHUNG, YUEH-HWA RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
PLTF FRANK RODRIGUEZ REQUEST FOR A SECOND CONTINUANCE SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, PABLO IND DBA "18TH ST.& MISSION MARKET" GOLDEN SWORD CORPORATION DOES 1-10 WENG, HSIEH-YAN WENG, MARY C. SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-24-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO WENG, HSEIH-YAN & MARY WENG C. RETURN ED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-03-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN SWORD CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, PABLO IND DBA "18TH ST.& MISSION MARKET"

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, PABLO IND DBA "18TH ST.& MISSION MARKET" GOLDEN SWORD CORPORATION WENG, HSIEH-YAN WENG, MARY C. WENG, JUDY WENG, DIANA C. CHUNG, YUEH-HWA DOE DEFENDANT DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF PLACE AND TIME OF HEARING TO WENG, JUDY ANDWENG MARY RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
